incidentSummary: Order API latency degraded while success rate stayed high due to simulated slow database operations in orders-service.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: orders-service slow-query simulation introduced deterministic DB delay
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: DB simulation log toggle was active, query span duration increased significantly, and DB-related latency metrics rose during the same window.

performanceFindings: Request p95/p99 increased with minimal 5xx impact, indicating a performance rather than availability incident.
recommendedActions: Track query duration histogram and set latency SLO burn alerts.
